description: A designed vertical card combining a hero photo on top with a bar-chart infographic on the bottom. The photo shows President Trump in a dark blue suit and red striped tie standing in front of a large American flag inside an industrial plant, gesturing as he talks with three workers in orange hi-vis coveralls and white hard hats covered in union/safety stickers (one at far right wears a dark uniform with a patch). A small embossed Department of Labor seal sits in the top-right corner. The lower white panel holds a chart titled in bold blue 'Factory Construction Soars Under President Trump', subtitle 'Gain in employment, non-residential specialty trade construction, cumulative since Jan. 2025'. A series of five rising red bars shows quarterly figures: 2025 Q1 = 9,300; Q2 = 19,500; Q3 = 26,100; Q4 = 31,800; 2026 Q1 = 54,200, each labeled in bold. Footnote: 'Note: CEA analysis of BLS data.' Visual style: patriotic hero imagery plus clean ascending red bars to signal momentum. Messaging/propaganda technique: pairs a leadership photo with a steadily climbing chart to attribute a manufacturing/construction-jobs boom to the President ('reindustrializing', 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST'). Target audience: blue-collar workers and the administration's economic base.
notable_text: Factory Construction Soars Under President Trump; Gain in employment, non-residential specialty trade construction, cumulative since Jan. 2025; 9,300 / 19,500 / 26,100 / 31,800 / 54,200
